hero.headline:
Your beauty journey,
in one place.
hero.subheadline: Track every treatment. Share on your terms. Understand your skin.

mapJourney.title: Track every treatment, by zone.
mapJourney.body: Map treatments to exact areas — face, neck, lips, and more. See your full history at a glance.

shareTerms.title: Share, on your terms.
shareTerms.body: Show your QR code. Your doctor gets exactly what you allow. Revoke anytime.

builtWithCare.title: Built with care.
builtWithCare.encryptedDesc: Your records are encrypted before they're stored. We can't read them.
builtWithCare.yourDataDesc: Export or delete everything, at any time, with one tap.
builtWithCare.aiControlDesc: Insights are opt-in. We never send your photos or notes to AI.
